entry.title: New: Reso 25-231 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"AUTHORIZING EMPLOYMENT OF BEST BEST & KRIEGER LLP AS SPECIAL COUNSEL TO ASSIST AND REPRESENT AS CO-COUNSEL THE DEPARTMENT OF ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT, COUNTY OF MAUI, WITH THE PERMITTING PROCESS AND ANY LEGAL CHALLENGES ARISING OUT OF THE ISSUANCE OF A NPDES PERMIT FOR THE LAHAINA WASTEWATER FACILITY (NPDES PERMIT NO. HI 0021848)"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
